checks.describe: core-internals profile is up: kind context kind-kubeadv-core answers and the worker node exists (CLUSTER KEPT — M4 continues on it)
the etcd static pod carries the M3 profile quota flag --quota-backend-bytes=268435456
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n kube-system get pod etcd-kubeadv-core-control-plane -o jsonpath='{.spec.containers[0].command}'

checks.describe: the etcd static pod exposes metrics on :2381 (feeds the X-Ray Storage lens)
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n kube-system get pod etcd-kubeadv-core-control-plane -o jsonpath='{.spec.containers[0].command}'

checks.describe: the NOSPACE alarm was disarmed: etcdctl alarm list is empty after recovery
checks.run: out=$(kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core exec -n kube-system etcd-kubeadv-core-control-plane -- etcdctl --cacert /etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/ca.crt --cert /etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.crt --key /etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.key alarm list); echo "alarms:[${out}]"

checks.describe: compact + defrag reclaimed the disk: dbSizeInUse <= dbSize and dbSize is back under the 256 MB quota
checks.run: J=$(kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core exec -n kube-system etcd-kubeadv-core-control-plane -- etcdctl --cacert /etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/ca.crt --cert /etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.crt --key /etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.key endpoint status -w json); S=$(printf '%s' "$J" | grep -o '"dbSize":[0-9]*' | head -1 | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' \n'); U=$(printf '%s' "$J" | grep -o '"dbSizeInUse":[0-9]*' | head -1 | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d ' \n'); [ -n "$S" ] && [ -n "$U" ] && [ "$U" -le "$S" ] && [ "$S" -lt 268435456 ] && echo DB-HEADROOM-OK || echo "DB-HEADROOM-BAD inuse=${U} physical=${S} quota=268435456"

checks.describe: teardown removed the junk namespace: etcd-lab is absent
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core get namespace etcd-lab 2>&1 || true

checks.describe: the cluster accepts writes again: a probe ConfigMap can be created and deleted
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n default delete configmap m3-write-probe --ignore-not-found >/dev/null; kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n default create configmap m3-write-probe --from-literal=probe=m3 && kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n default delete configmap m3-write-probe
